nasb.text: He will not be disheartened or crushed Until He has established justice in the earth; And the coastlands will wait expectantly for His law.”

esv.text: He will not grow faint or be discouraged till he has established justice in the earth; and the coastlands wait for his law.

cnv.text: 他不灰心，也不沮喪， 直到他在地上設立公理， 眾海島的人都等候他的教訓。

ccb.text: 祂不灰心也不沮丧， 直到祂在地上设立正义。 四海都渴望祂的训诲。”

csbs.text: 他不衰残，也不被压服， 直到他在地上设立公正； 众海岛都期盼他的律法。”
